title: The Cost of Progress
article_text: A growing awareness of history helps us understand how wealth was built. In the past, violent slave labor was used to make wealthy landowners even richer. The architecture of old plantations still stands as a reminder of this injustice. It is not acceptable to forget that many people were forced to work without pay. A personal journal from that time can reveal the deep depression felt by those who suffered. One random illustration in a museum shows a burst of emotion from a slave family being separated. The privilege of freedom was a luxury that few could buy, but every buyer knew the cost. Mutual respect between all people was not a common value in that society. Today, we must be motivated to teach this history in every classroom and laboratory of thought. Only then can we successfully bury the old ideas that ruin our shared future.

sentences.zh: 对历史日益增长的认识有助于我们理解财富是如何建立起来的。
